title: Context Window Management
subtitle: Context Window Management
description: LLM context windows are finite. In long-running tasks, how do you retain critical information, trim redundant content, and prevent token limit crashes? This is not an optimization problem—it's a survival problem.
sub_problems: Token estimation: Precisely estimate the token count of the current prompt before calling the LLM
Over-limit trimming: Trim content by priority (old messages, tool results, search materials)
Summary compression: Compress long conversation history into summaries while preserving key information
Sliding window: Retain only the last N conversation turns or last N tool results
Budget allocation: Allocate token budgets for different content types
Observation economics quantification: Compare discovery cost vs. read cost, calculate compression ROI and display to users
Mode inheritance and type filtering: Automatically switch observation types/concept filters across different work modes
Cross-session transcript recovery: Reverse-extract previous assistant messages from JSONL transcripts and inject into context
Observation content deduplication: 30-second sliding window deduplication based on SHA256 hashing to prevent duplicate storage
Knowledge base external persistence: Write compressed summaries to external files rather than memory only, ensuring availability across purge cycles
Read interception optimization: Redirect read_file calls on already-implemented files to summaries, avoiding repeated token consumption from re-reading raw files
Event-driven purging: Use tool call events (e.g., write_file) as purge triggers rather than token thresholds
Tool output compression: Compress large raw data returned by tools into structured summaries while preserving core knowledge
Prompt template management: Systematically manage system prompts through external configuration files, supporting multi-language switching
AI/Tool message pair protection: Avoid splitting tool call and result pairs during compression
Sub-agent context isolation: Prevent sub-agent internal conversations from polluting main agent context through architectural design
Summary model selection: Choose the most cost-effective model for compression tasks rather than the main model
Compression direction selection: Decide whether to retain recent messages (conversations) or oldest messages (task context) based on scenario
Recursive summary convergence: Multi-round sliding window summarization for ultra-long text, preventing infinite recursion (MetaGPT uses max_count=100 as fallback)
Cumulative budget tracking: Track total token consumption across multiple LLM calls, not just single requests
Tool description budget inclusion: Include tool JSON Schema descriptions in token budget calculations
Multimodal element context: Extract surrounding text for images/tables/formulas to assist LLM understanding
Context granularity selection: Choose page-level or chunk-level context windows based on document type
Context configuration hot-update: Dynamically adjust context parameters at runtime and propagate to all processing components
best_practices: Estimation is mandatory: Whatever approach you use, you must know current token usage before calling
Reserve safety margin: MiroThinker's 85% strategy is worth emulating—reserve 15-20% space for output
Tiered trimming beats one-size-fits-all: Tool results > old conversations > system prompts, prioritize by importance
Verify format after compression: Fixing dangling tool calls is an easy-to-overlook but critical detail
Account for multi-provider differences: Different LLMs have different tokenizers, requiring adaptation
Visualize economics: Show savings percentage to help users understand compression value, not just silent compression
Structured storage beats raw preservation: After decomposing into type/title/facts fields, you can filter and aggregate by dimension
Progressive disclosure in layers: Expand last N items + compress remainder into table rows, balancing information density and token efficiency
Configuration priority chain: env > file > defaults for three-level override, supporting runtime adjustment without restart
Clean-Slate suits file-level independent tasks: When each subtask (e.g., implementing one file) is relatively independent, aggressive purging is more efficient than progressive compression
External knowledge base beats in-memory summaries: Summaries written to files are unaffected by context purging and can be shared across agents
Read-file interception saves significant tokens: Files with existing summaries don't need to re-read raw content
Source truncation beats downstream trimming: Limit size at data structure creation time, preventing large data from entering downstream pipelines
Multi-level fallback ensures availability: API > tiktoken > litellm > estimation, guaranteeing token tracking in any environment
Retain original data references after compression: ToolTrace stores both summary and truncated raw_answer simultaneously, enabling rollback
Fix dangling calls before compression: DanglingToolCallMiddleware must execute before SummarizationMiddleware
Fraction-based triggers adapt across models: Use window percentage rather than absolute token counts, auto-adapting to different model context windows
Configuration-driven over hardcoded: All thresholds via YAML config, ops can adjust without code changes
Compression transparent to callers: Intercept uniformly at LLM base class, upper-layer Role/Action unaware of token limits
Multi-tokenizer tiered adaptation: Precise SDK > tiktoken > character estimation, graceful degradation rather than one-size-fits-all
Abnormal termination beats silent trimming: Throw explicit exceptions on over-limit, letting callers decide strategy, avoiding silent context loss causing hallucinations
Singleton pattern ensures counter uniqueness: LLM instances with same config share cumulative counters, preventing scattered counting from multiple instantiations
Tool descriptions count toward token budget: More tools = higher token overhead, must include in budget checks
Truncate at 80% threshold with sentence boundary fallback, avoiding semantic breaks
Reuse downstream LLM's tokenizer for context truncation, ensuring consistent token counting
Prepare dual prompt templates for with/without context scenarios, avoiding empty context field transmission

values.ClaudeMem: character count/4 constant estimation, no tokenizer dependency
values.DeepCode: tiktoken precise calculation + character count/4 fallback dual-track
values.DeepTutor: Four-level degradation: API response > tiktoken > litellm > word count×1.3
values.MetaGPT: tiktoken(OpenAI) + anthropic SDK(Claude) + character×0.5 fallback three-level adaptation
values.OpenManus: tiktoken precise encoding, including image tile calculation and tool description counting
values.PageIndex: tiktoken precise calculation per model encoding for each page token count
values.RAG-Anything: LightRAG tokenizer precise encode/decode, supporting character-level fallback

values.DeerFlow: LLM summary replaces old messages + dangling tool call fixing
values.DeepResearch: AgentFold step-level merging + ReSum full replacement
values.ClaudeMem: Structured observation replaces raw conversation, 6-field decomposed storage
values.DeepCode: Clean-Slate full purge + LLM-generated structured code summary external persistence
values.DeepTutor: NoteAgent LLM summary compression + ToolTrace 50KB source truncation
values.MetaGPT: 4 CompressType enums: pre/post × msg/token combinations, configuration-driven selection
values.OpenManus: No compression, sliding window truncation only (max_messages=100)
values.PageIndex: Tree node merging + token threshold pruning
values.RAG-Anything: No compression, truncation only; 80% threshold sentence boundary fallback

values.DeerFlow: Three triggers OR logic (any one satisfied)
values.DeepCode: write_file event-driven + 190K token threshold + 50 message hard limit
values.DeepTutor: Auto-trigger NoteAgent compression after each tool call
values.MetaGPT: Auto-trigger compress_messages before aask() call, transparent to upper layers
values.OpenManus: Throw exception when cumulative input tokens exceed max_input_tokens
values.PageIndex: Auto-split when grouped token total exceeds LLM limit
values.RAG-Anything: Extract context on-demand during each multimodal element processing

values.ClaudeMem: Independent MCP plugin, context injection via system prompt
values.MetaGPT: BaseLLM base class unified implementation, all Provider subclasses inherit
values.RAG-Anything: Independent ContextExtractor class, injected into all ModalProcessor

values.DeerFlow: Summary failure fallback to retain last 15 messages
values.DeepResearch: Independent ReSum model server doesn't occupy main model window
values.ClaudeMem: Database init failure returns empty string, transcript parsing skips malformed lines
values.DeepCode: Tokenizer unavailable fallback to character estimation, summary generation 3-retry
values.DeepTutor: LLMContextError + ProviderContextWindowError dual-layer exceptions + auto message mapping
values.MetaGPT: Unknown CompressType returns NO_COMPRESS, unknown model fallback cl100k_base
values.OpenManus: TokenLimitExceeded no retry, Agent graceful termination with error logging
values.PageIndex: Three-level degradation + validate_and_truncate index bounds protection
values.RAG-Anything: Tokenizer unavailable fallback to character truncation; exception returns empty string

values.ClaudeMem: Configuration-driven: last N observations + M session summaries
values.DeepCode: Retain only system_prompt + initial_plan + knowledge base summary, full history purge
values.DeerFlow: Configurable keep parameter (messages/tokens/fraction), default retain last 20 messages
values.MetaGPT: System Prompt never trimmed, threshold=0.8 reserves 20% for output
values.RAG-Anything: Sliding window retains N pages/chunks before and after, default window=1

values.ClaudeMem: ModeConfig defines complete prompt template, supports inheritance override
values.DeepTutor: YAML multi-language prompt + singleton cache + zh→cn→en degradation chain
values.DeerFlow: SYSTEM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE dynamic concatenation, supports conditional injection of subagent/skills/memory
values.OpenManus: Python constant definition, files separated by Agent type (toolcall/swe)

values.ClaudeMem: SQLite WAL mode persistence, cross-session available
values.DeepCode: implement_code_summary.md file persistence of code summary, cross-turn readable

values.ClaudeMem: Context Index semantic indexing replaces raw text, get_observations on-demand for details
values.DeepCode: read_file calls intercepted and redirected to read_code_mem returning summary

values.ClaudeMem: observation level (each record independent), not message or conversation level
values.DeepTutor: By tool call granularity, each call independently compressed into one ToolTrace
values.DeerFlow: AI/Tool message pair protection, no splitting of tool call sequences
values.MetaGPT: BrainMemory character-level sliding window (window_size - 20 step), not semantic segmentation
values.OpenManus: Message-level truncation, no splitting of single messages
values.PageIndex: Page-level grouping, overlap_page ensures semantic coherence

values.ClaudeMem: 3-level config priority (env > file > defaults), env variables take effect immediately
values.RAG-Anything: update_context_config dynamically modifies parameters and propagates to all processors

values.DeepCode: Each file implementation cycle independent, write_file followed by clean-slate naturally isolates
values.DeerFlow: Sub-agents run in isolated context, results injected as ToolMessage back to main agent
Cross-call cumulative tracking not implemented, single-trigger check only
values.MetaGPT: CostManager accumulates prompt/completion tokens and cost across calls, supports max_budget
values.OpenManus: Cross-call accumulation of total_input_tokens, singleton pattern ensures global uniqueness

values.PageIndex: Bottom-up merging, recursively split nodes exceeding token limit

values.RAG-Anything: Extract surrounding text for images/tables/formulas to assist LLM understanding

solutions.title: _estimate_tokens() tiktoken estimation + ensure_summary_context() automatic fallback
solutions.description: openai_client.py:363-382 _estimate_tokens() uses tiktoken o200k_base encoder for precise token estimation (fallback cl100k_base → len//4). openai_client.py:384-444 ensure_summary_context() checks before generating final answer whether prompt_tokens + completion_tokens + summary_tokens + max_tokens + 1000 buffer exceeds limit; if exceeded, removes last assistant-user conversation pair. 1.5x safety coefficient.
design_philosophy: Precision over estimation: tiktoken o200k_base precise counting, fallback to cl100k_base → len(text)//4
Prevention over treatment: ensure_summary_context() checks before call, not waiting for API 400 error
1.5x safety coefficient + 1000 token fixed buffer dual protection
Fallback strategy removes last conversation pair rather than truncating content
migration_scenarios: Multi-turn agents where messages accumulate continuously in ReAct loops
Projects using OpenAI as primary LLM (tiktoken encoder compatible)
Scenarios requiring context capacity check before generating final answer

solutions.title: DanglingToolCallMiddleware + SummarizationMiddleware dual middleware fault-tolerant compression
solutions.description: DanglingToolCallMiddleware scans AIMessage.tool_calls in before_model hook, injecting status="error" placeholder messages for dangling calls lacking ToolMessage responses. SummarizationMiddleware supports three trigger conditions (tokens threshold/message count/fraction usage), generating LLM summaries to replace old messages upon trigger while retaining last N messages with AI/Tool message pair protection preventing splits. Summary failure falls back to retaining last 15 messages.
design_philosophy: Middleware pattern: context compression and dangling fix as pluggable AgentMiddleware
Three trigger conditions OR logic: tokens/messages/fraction any one satisfied triggers compression
AI/Tool message pair protection: cut points don't split AIMessage and corresponding ToolMessage
Summary failure fault tolerance: generation failure returns "Error generating summary", doesn't block main flow
migration_scenarios: Scenarios with user interruption/network timeout causing dangling tool calls in multi-turn conversations
Long conversations requiring three-dimensional compression triggers (token/message count/usage rate)

solutions.title: AgentFold <compress> tag + ReSum 90% threshold full summary replacement
solutions.description: AgentFold/infer.py:78 lets LLM actively generate <compress> tags declaring foldable history steps. update_and_sort_steps() (infer.py:170-198) maintains step_list structure, merging consecutive steps into [Compressed Step X to Y]. ReSum (WebResummer/src/react_agent.py:135) calls independent summary model for full message history replacement when token usage reaches 90%. Uses two prompt sets: QUERY_SUMMARY_PROMPT (initial) and QUERY_SUMMARY_PROMPT_LAST (incremental).
design_philosophy: LLM-active compression: model better understands which information remains important for current reasoning
Step-level granularity: not summarizing entire conversation, but maintaining step_list with step-level merging
ReSum nuclear option fallback: full message history replacement at 90% threshold, sacrificing detail for space
Incremental summary increasing quality: QUERY_SUMMARY_PROMPT_LAST analyzes new progress based on previous summary
migration_scenarios: Multi-turn agent reasoning where history steps accumulate continuously
Projects needing LLM self-judgment on compression scope (not rule engine)
Extreme context pressure requiring full summary replacement in deep research agents

solutions.title: trim_context_to_word_limit() 25000 word ceiling + visited_urls cross-layer deduplication
solutions.description: gpt_researcher/skills/deep_research.py DeepResearchSkill trims merged learnings + context + citations to 25000 words using trim_context_to_word_limit() after tree-structured recursive search (breadth=4, depth=2) completes. Cross-layer shared visited_urls set implements URL-level deduplication preventing duplicate fetches. Concurrency controlled via asyncio.Semaphore(2) limiting simultaneous queries.
design_philosophy: Hard ceiling trimming: 25000 words limit prevents LLM context overflow
Cross-layer URL deduplication: visited_urls set passes across recursion layers, preventing duplicate fetches
Breadth halving per layer: max(2, breadth // 2) controls exponential explosion
Knowledge accumulation: learnings pass across layers, subsequent layers generate sub-queries based on prior knowledge
migration_scenarios: Tree-structured recursive research needing result merging and trimming
Agents needing hard word count ceiling preventing context overflow

solutions.title: Observation economics and progressive context injection
solutions.description: ClaudeMem uses observation structured storage + character/4 token estimation + 12-item configuration-driven progressive disclosure, implementing discovery vs. read economics quantification compression

solutions.title: Clean-Slate context management
solutions.description: DeepCode uses ConciseMemoryAgent implementing write_file event-driven Clean-Slate purging, paired with LLM-generated structured code summary external persistence to .md files, achieving file-level context isolation

solutions.title: Three-level token budget truncation
solutions.description: Precise token measurement: uses tiktoken (default gpt-4o-mini encoder) for precise encoding counting of each retrieval result rather than character estimation (lightrag/utils.py:1350-1364); three independent budgets: entity budget 6000 to

solutions.title: BrainMemory sliding window and 4-strategy compression
solutions.description: MetaGPT auto-trims messages before BaseLLM.aask() via CompressType 4-strategy enum (pre/post × msg/token), BrainMemory uses sliding window + recursive LLM summary compression for long-term memory with Redis persistence

solutions.title: Adaptive chunking compression and context window guard
solutions.description: chars/4 quick estimation + 1.2x safety margin: no tokenizer library dependency, character count/4 estimates tokens; adaptive chunking compression: dynamically adjusts chunk ratio (0.15~0.4) based on average message size

solutions.title: Guard
solutions.description: OpenManus uses tiktoken precise counting + LLM singleton cumulative budget check + Memory sliding window three-layer defense, throwing TokenLimitExceeded exception terminating agent on over-limit

solutions.title: Token budget document splitting
solutions.description: Precise token counting: uses tiktoken per-model encoding for precise page token calculation (utils.py:22-27); smart grouping + overlap pages: page_list_to_group_text() function (page_index.py:

solutions.title: Multimodal context extraction and token truncation
solutions.description: RAG-Anything uses ContextExtractor three-mode sliding window (page/chunk/token) extracting surrounding text context for multimodal elements, precise truncation via LightRAG tokenizer with sentence boundary fallback
